claimBoundary: the dense weight module is a loadable full-width matrix representation of one digest-pinned ALM numeric model - it carries W_Q/W_K/W_V-style hard-max attention projections, FFN matrices, residual wiring matrices, write rows, source-model digest, and replay fixtures; it is not a trained transformer, does not claim softmax semantics, and is valid only for deterministic replay inside the numeric exactness window

denseModule.claimBoundary: the dense weight module is a loadable full-width matrix representation of one digest-pinned ALM numeric model - it carries W_Q/W_K/W_V-style hard-max attention projections, FFN matrices, residual wiring matrices, write rows, source-model digest, and replay fixtures; it is not a trained transformer, does not claim softmax semantics, and is valid only for deterministic replay inside the numeric exactness window
